analysis_question: When flowsheet documents SAT or SBT happened, does algorithm detect it?
main_methods: Sensitivity / specificity / PPV / NPV against nurse-flowsheet reference

file_shape: Long for primary, wide for Fine-Gray
analysis_question: When algorithm applied, do patients who receive SBT/SAT get off vent faster?
Do patients who receive more SAT/SBT have more days alive and off ventilator?
Do patients who receive SBT/SAT have shorter ICU stays and lower mortality?
main_methods: ZTNB for LOS + mixed-effects logistic for mortality

analysis_question: Which hospitals deliver SAT/SBT at high vs low rates after case-mix adjustment?
main_methods: Risk-adjusted hospital rates with caterpillar / funnel plots
